text: Eating a balanced diet is one of the foundations of healthy living. It means including plenty of fruits, vegetables, whole grains, and lean proteins in your meals while limiting processed foods and sugar. Alongside good nutrition, regular exercise is important—even thirty minutes of walking, cycling, or swimming each day can improve your strength and mood. Sleep is equally essential; most adults need seven to nine hours per night to feel rested and focused. Mental health also matters, so take time to relax, practise stress management, and connect with others. Finally, a healthy work-life balance allows you to recharge and enjoy daily life without feeling overwhelmed.
